tasks.label: Start BITS keepalive
tasks.command: cd /Users/akshkaushik/Desktop/BitsPilaniAuthScript && if [ -f ~/.config/bits-keepalive/credentials.env ]; then nohup ./bits_keepalive.sh > bits_keepalive.log 2>&1 & echo started; else echo missing_credentials; fi

tasks.label: Fix git push for main
tasks.command: cd /Users/akshkaushik/Desktop/BitsPilaniAuthScript && git status --porcelain && git pull --rebase origin main && git push origin main

tasks.label: Commit then rebase push
tasks.command: cd /Users/akshkaushik/Desktop/BitsPilaniAuthScript && git add -A && git commit -m "Update README and keepalive improvements" && git pull --rebase origin main && git push origin main
